content.query:
--CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_employee_extended

--AS 

Select DISTINCT Top(10)

 aa.PersonID
,aa.EmployeeFirstName
,aa.EmployeeLastName
,aa.EmployeeName
,aa.GenderID
,aa.Gender
,aa.DOB
,aa.EmployeeNumber
,aa.LegacyEmployeeNumber
,aa.CivilServiceStartDate
,aa.DateToCurrentJob
,aa.DateToSubstantiveGrade
,aa.SeniorityDate
,aa.RoleStartDate
,aa.FixTermEndDate
,aa.LoanStartDate
,aa.LoanEndDate
,aa.ReasonForAction
,aa.AnnualSalary
,aa.Currency
,aa.Postcode
,aa.AddressLine1
,aa.AddressLine2
,aa.AddressLine3
,aa.City
,aa.County
,aa.FTEPercentage
,aa.FTE
,aa.WorkHours
,aa.EmploymentStatus
,aa.PartTimeEmployee
,aa.EmployeeGroupCode
,aa.EmployeeGroup
,aa.CostCenterCode
,aa.CostCenterCentre
,aa.PositionCode
,aa.Position
,aa.WorkScheduleID
,aa.WorkScheduleRule
,aa.WorkWeekDays
,aa.WorkWeekHours
,aa.WorkDayHours
,aa.Grade
,aa.GradeDescription
,aa.GradeGroupV1
,aa.GradeGroupV2
,aa.JobCategoryShort
,aa.JobCategory
,aa.PersonnelAreaCode
,aa.PersonnelArea
,aa.PayrollAreaCode
,aa.PayrollArea
,aa.OrganisationalUnitCode
,aa.OrganisationUnit
,aa.PersonnelSubAreaCode
,aa.PersonnelSubArea
,aa.WorkContractCode
,aa.WorkContract
,aa.WorkContractType
,aa.L1ManagerID
,aa.L1ManagerFirstName
,aa.L1ManagerLastName
,aa.L1ManagerName
,aa.L2ManagerID
,aa.L2ManagerFirstName
,aa.L2ManagerLastName
,aa.L2ManagerName
,aa.EmployeeIsActive
,aa.EmployeeValidTo
,aa.RoleIsActive
,aa.RoleValidTo
,aa.FactIsActive
,aa.FactValidTo
,aa.ReasonForLeaving
,max(aa.LeaveDate) as LatestLeaveDate

FROM

mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee aa

GROUP BY

aa.PersonID
,aa.EmployeeFirstName
,aa.EmployeeLastName
,aa.EmployeeName
,aa.GenderID
,aa.Gender
,aa.DOB
,aa.EmployeeNumber
,aa.LegacyEmployeeNumber
,aa.CivilServiceStartDate
,aa.DateToCurrentJob
,aa.DateToSubstantiveGrade
,aa.SeniorityDate
,aa.RoleStartDate
,aa.FixTermEndDate
,aa.LoanStartDate
,aa.LoanEndDate
,aa.ReasonForAction
,aa.AnnualSalary
,aa.Currency
,aa.Postcode
,aa.AddressLine1
,aa.AddressLine2
,aa.AddressLine3
,aa.City
,aa.County
,aa.FTEPercentage
,aa.FTE
,aa.WorkHours
,aa.EmploymentStatus
,aa.PartTimeEmployee
,aa.EmployeeGroupCode
,aa.EmployeeGroup
,aa.CostCenterCode
,aa.CostCenterCentre
,aa.PositionCode
,aa.Position
,aa.WorkScheduleID
,aa.WorkScheduleRule
,aa.WorkWeekDays
,aa.WorkWeekHours
,aa.WorkDayHours
,aa.Grade
,aa.GradeDescription
,aa.GradeGroupV1
,aa.GradeGroupV2
,aa.JobCategoryShort
,aa.JobCategory
,aa.PersonnelAreaCode
,aa.PersonnelArea
,aa.PayrollAreaCode
,aa.PayrollArea
,aa.OrganisationalUnitCode
,aa.OrganisationUnit
,aa.PersonnelSubAreaCode
,aa.PersonnelSubArea
,aa.WorkContractCode
,aa.WorkContract
,aa.WorkContractType
,aa.L1ManagerID
,aa.L1ManagerFirstName
,aa.L1ManagerLastName
,aa.L1ManagerName
,aa.L2ManagerID
,aa.L2ManagerFirstName
,aa.L2ManagerLastName
,aa.L2ManagerName
,aa.EmployeeIsActive
,aa.EmployeeValidTo
,aa.RoleIsActive
,aa.RoleValidTo
,aa.FactIsActive
,aa.FactValidTo
,aa.ReasonForLeaving

GO
